description: 子 CLI 命令描述符 — --help 子命令列表

replacements.description: \"Manage exec approvals (ga: description: "管理执行审批（网关或节点主机）"
replacements.description: \"Run and manage the headle: description: "运行和管理无头节点主机服务"
replacements.description: \"Open a terminal UI connec: description: "打开连接到网关的终端界面"
replacements.description: \"Open a local terminal UI: description: "打开本地终端界面（tui --local 的别名）"
replacements.description: \"DNS helpers for wide-area: description: "DNS 工具 - 广域发现（Tailscale + CoreDNS）"
replacements.description: \"Search the live OpenClaw: description: "搜索 OpenClaw 在线文档"
replacements.description: \"Legacy clawbot command al: description: "旧版 clawbot 命令别名"
replacements.description: \"Secure DM pairing (approv: description: "安全私信配对（审批入站请求）"
replacements.description: \"Lookup contact and group: description: "查询支持渠道的联系人和群组 ID"
replacements.description: \"Update OpenClaw and inspe: description: "更新 OpenClaw 并检查更新渠道状态"
replacements.description: \"Generate shell completion: description: "生成 Shell 补全脚本"
replacements.description: \"Run QA scenarios and laun: description: "运行 QA 场景并启动私有 QA 调试器 UI"
replacements.description: \"Run provider capability c: description: "运行提供商能力命令（备用别名：infer）"
replacements.description: \"Show or synchronize reque: description: "查看或同步请求的执行策略与主机审批"
replacements.description: \"Run the OpenClaw debug pr: description: "运行 OpenClaw 调试代理并查看捕获的流量"
replacements.description: \"Run, inspect, and query t: description: "运行、检查和查询 WebSocket 网关"
replacements.description: \"Tail gateway file logs vi: description: "通过 RPC 查看网关文件日志"
replacements.description: \"Manage gateway-owned node: description: "管理网关拥有的节点（配对、状态、调用和媒体）"
replacements.description: \"Manage sandbox containers: description: "管理沙箱容器（基于 Docker 的代理隔离）"
replacements.description: \"Manage cron jobs (via Gat: description: "管理 cron 任务（通过网关）"
replacements.description: \"Manage OpenClaw plugins a: description: "管理 OpenClaw 插件和扩展"
replacements.description: \"Manage connected chat cha: description: "管理已连接聊天渠道和账号"
replacements.description: \"Audit local config and st: description: "审计本地配置和状态中的常见安全隐患"
replacements.description: \"Run an ACP bridge backed: description: "运行由网关支持的 ACP 桥接"
replacements.description: \"System tools (events, hea: description: "系统工具（事件、心跳、在线状态）"
replacements.\"Generate a mobile pairing QR code and: "生成移动端配对二维码和设置码"
replacements.description: \"Discover and claim promot: description: "发现并领取 ClawHub 模型优惠"
replacements.description: \"Run provider-backed infer: description: "通过稳定 CLI 界面运行提供商支持的推理命令"
replacements.description: \"Create, inspect, restore,: description: "创建、查看、恢复和清理托管 worktree"
